Test 3: Event Handler - HTML Entity Space ( )

5

Test 5: Event Handler - Non-Breaking Space ( )

<img src=x onerror="console.log('Nbsp onerror')">

6

Test 6: Event Handler - Tab Entity ( )

<img src=x onerror="console.log('Tab entity onerror')">
